response.justification: Strong fullstack background with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent roles align directly with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and the current re:cinq role explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching a key required skill. Demonstrates engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and polyglot proficiency. Some gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience mentioned, and PostgreSQL/cloud platform depth is unclear.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP development experience at current role, matching a specific required skill
Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (robotic arms at Altom, pre-2018); recent backend work has been Node/DLang
Cloud platform depth limited to AWS CDK reference; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production specifics beyond GISCollective
